chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter 02-23 - EECS at Berkeley. The newsletter provides updates and announcements for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It includes information on academic opportunities, events, and resources relevant to EECS students.

This newsletter covers topics such as course offerings, research opportunities, and student support services. It aims to keep students informed about important deadlines, workshops, and networking events within the EECS community.
Students can use the newsletter to stay updated on faculty positions, internships, and career development resources. It serves as a central hub for news affecting EECS undergraduates at Berkeley.
